campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's investment report for March 2026, passed a new policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities, and discussed efforts to fill city job openings and improve employee retention.
keyTopics: March 2026 investment transactions report from regional transit authority
New policy prohibiting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and recruitment/retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on properties identified by the County, and voted to move forward with the cleanup orders. The council also adopted a new technology policy for the city and approved a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by County
City Council adoption of new Technology Disruption Policy
New process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve routine meeting minutes, review the town's finances from March, and authorize several contracts and agreements. The council approved donations of safety equipment, authorized a paving contractor to work on town roads, and applied for state grants.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract for town roads
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillator (AED)
Submitted grant applications for state funding
Adopted list of projects for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and review work plans for city committees. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and reviewed what items should go on the June 2 agenda, while also updating plans for neighborhood services and government operations.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 City Council meeting
June 2, 2026 agenda planning and new item submissions
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan
City-sponsored events approvals

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the upcoming fiscal year. The council also reviewed agendas and reports from various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member applications being reviewed and selected
Public comment period open to residents
Fiscal Year 2026-27 budget planning cycle
City board and commission agenda items

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met on May 19, 2026, to conduct regular business and recognize two important observances: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included a flag salute and special recognition of these community initiatives.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
April meeting minutes approval

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's long-term Health and Safety plan (covering 2015-2040), recognized the Public Works Department for their work on roads, trees, facilities and other services during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update to the General Plan (2015-2040)
Public Works Department recognition for Capital Improvements, Transportation, Sustainability, and maintenance services
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month celebration
One or more agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, to discuss plans and development related to the station area. The meeting was open to the public both in person at City Hall and online via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall East Wing, 1500 Warburton Avenue
Public participation available in-person and via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held several public hearings on May 19, 2026, to vote on new local rules, approve a real estate development permit change, confirm property assessments, and permanently hire a new city manager.
keyTopics: Emergency ordinance and new city regulations requiring public input
Real estate development permit amendment and tentative map approval
Property assessment confirmation and collection process
Hiring of permanent city manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed the city's progress on converting homes from gas to electric power and reviewed proposed rules to help the region meet air quality standards. The council heard staff presentations and received an environmental review update on these electrification programs.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status and timeline for converting homes to electric systems
Proposed principles for electrification assistance programs
Compliance strategy for Air District regulations
Council member announcements and public comments
